resources.name: regeneration_by_plot
resources.description: rejuvenation values on plot level (or subplot level in case of core area)

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of regeneration survey

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)

fields.name: subplot_id
fields.description: id of subplot (1 for circular plots)

fields.name: number_of_tree_species
fields.description: number of tree species with DBH < 5 cm (rejuvenation)

fields.name: mean_number_established_ha
fields.description: mean number per hectare of established rejuvenation (DBH < 5 cm & height > 50 cm)

fields.name: lci_number_established_ha
fields.description: lower confidence interval (lci) of number per hectare of established rejuvenation

fields.name: uci_number_established_ha
fields.description: upper confidence interval (uci) of number per hectare of established rejuvenation

fields.name: mean_number_seedlings_ha
fields.description: mean number per hectare of seedlings (DBH < 5 cm & height < 50 cm)

fields.name: lci_number_seedlings_ha
fields.description: lower confidence interval (lci) of number per hectare of seedlings

fields.name: uci_number_seedlings_ha
fields.description: upper confidence interval (uci) of number per hectare of seedlings

fields.name: approx_nr_established_ha
fields.description: mean number per hectare of established rejuvenation (DBH < 5 cm & height > 50 cm)

fields.name: approx_nr_seedlings_ha
fields.description: mean number per hectare  of seedlings (DBH < 5 cm & height < 50 cm)

resources.name: dendro_by_plot
resources.description: dendrometric values of living trees and deadwood on plot level
resources.extra_info: number of tree species, number of trees, basal area, volume …
resources.source_database: nog aanvullen -> bestandsnaam van databank in attr van berekeningen steken!!!!!!!!!

fields.name: plottype
fields.description: CP:  circular plot; CA: core area

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of dendro survey (year of growing season)
fields.extra_info: f.e. march 2020 becomes 2019 (start of growing season is set to May 1)

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)
fields.extra_info: "0" only occurs for dendro data in plot 11000 (1986)

fields.name: number_of_tree_species
fields.description: number of tree species
fields.extra_info: only living species with dbh > 7 cm

fields.name: number_of_trees_ha
fields.description: number of living individuals per ha (1/ha)
fields.extra_info: coppice is considered as one tree  - small stems (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: stem_number_ha
fields.description: number of living stems per ha (1/ha)
fields.extra_info: small stems (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: basal_area_alive_m2_ha
fields.description: basal area of living trees per ha (m²/ha)
fields.extra_info: small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: basal_area_dead_m2_ha
fields.description: basal area of standing deadwood per ha (m²/ha)
fields.extra_info: small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_alive_m3_ha
fields.description: standing volume of living trees per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing" and "tblTarieven_1ingKroon"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_dead_standing_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing deadwood per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: idem

fields.name: vol_bole_alive_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_bole_dead_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions based on height and diameter at breast height
fields.extra_info: idem

fields.name: vol_log_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of lying deadwood per ha (m³/ha);  small fragments excluded (diameter < 10 cm or length < 1m; if diameter > 20 cm, length < 0,5m)
fields.extra_info: volume is calculated using Smalian’s formula (except for circular plots Kersselaerspleyn (2001-2065) 1st survey (2000):  volume of fallen trees is based on tariffs, and if necessary cut of at border of the plot)

fields.name: vol_deadw_m3_ha
fields.description: total volume deadwood per ha (m³/ha) -  lying + standing
fields.extra_info: vol_log_m3_ha + vol_dead_standing_m3_ha

fields.name: stems_per_tree
fields.description: mean number of stems per tree
fields.extra_info: additional info for coppice

resources.name: dendro_by_plot_species
resources.description: dendrometric values of living trees and deadwood per plot and per species
resources.extra_info: number of trees, basal area, volume, mean number of stems per tree (info on copppice), …
resources.source_database: nog aanvullen -> bestandsnaam van databank in attr van berekeningen steken!!!!!!!!!

resources.name: deadw_by_decay_plot
resources.description: volumes of lying & standing deadwood per plot and per decay stage
resources.extra_info: op dit moment enkel nog liggend dood hout (22/11/2023: zal aangepast worden in package)
resources.source_database: nog aanvullen -> bestandsnaam van databank in attr van berekeningen steken!!!!!!!!!

fields.name: plottype
fields.description: CP:  circular plot; CA: core area

fields.name: plot_id
fields.description: unique sample plot id

fields.name: year
fields.description: year of dendro survey (year of growing season)
fields.extra_info: f.e. march 2020 becomes 2019 (start of growing season is set to May 1)

fields.name: period
fields.description: period: "1" for 1st decade (2000-2010), "2" for 2nd decade (2011-2020), "3" for 3th decade (2021-2030)
fields.extra_info: "0" only occurs for dendro data in plot 11000 (1986)

fields.name: decaystage
fields.description: decay stage code: from 10 to 15, with 10 very recent fallen and 15 fully decayed with remains in litter
fields.extra_info: see table "qDecaystage"

fields.name: vol_dead_standing_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing deadwood per ha (m³/ha): tree bole + crown volume (if present) calculated using species specific volume functions (tariffs) based on height and diameter at breast height;  for snags formula of a cilinder is used
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing" and "tblTarieven_1ingKroon"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_bole_dead_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of standing tree bole (m³/ha) calculated using species specific volume functions (tariffs) based on height and diameter at breast height; for snags formula of a cilinder is used
fields.extra_info: source: Dagnelie et al., Quataert et al., Dik, Berben; see table "tblTarieven_2ing"; volume up to a top diameter of 7 cm; small trees (dbh < 5 cm) excluded

fields.name: vol_log_m3_ha
fields.description: volume of lying deadwood per ha (m³/ha);  small fragments excluded (diameter < 10 cm or length < 1m; if diameter > 20 cm, length < 0,5m)
fields.extra_info: volume is calculated using Smalian’s formula

resources.name: deadw_by_decay_plot_species
resources.description: volumes of lying & standing deadwood per plot, species and decay stage
resources.source_database: nog aanvullen -> bestandsnaam van databank in attr van berekeningen steken!!!!!!!!!
